'''Brion Peck''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] commando shrouded in mystery.

==Biography==
Peck and his team were sent to [[Rafft]] shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], tasked with sabotaging the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison on the planet. Their mission went poorly, however, when a [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] attached to their ship gave them away to the Imperials. Fortunately for Peck, [[Dannen Lifehold]], a former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and mercenary, saved them. Brion disliked Lifehold, however, because the woman he loved, [[Beka Lewis]], was killed several years earlier by mercenaries.<ref name="CO" />
